Celestial Aviation is not answering their phones.

I couldn’t find a BBJ (or much about these guys so far) but they DO seem to operate a VIP Boeing 727-200 (Registration M-STAR) 

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BkVA-x5F8Bw

Still looking…
